quote_suppression.description: Never flag anything inside quotation marks - the child's (or anyone's) own words must be recorded verbatim and are good practice.

qualifier_suppression.description: If a flagged term is preceded (within window_words) by an observational qualifier, suppress the match for the listed categories. 'Appeared distressed when...' is good practice; bare 'distressed/angry' is not.

trailing_evidence_suppression.description: If a flagged EMOTIONAL LABEL is immediately followed by an evidential connective, the writer is tying the label to an observation/trigger - downgrade rather than suppress by default.

never_flag.description: Neutral observational vocabulary that must NEVER be flagged even if a future dataset edit accidentally overlaps. The engine checks matches against this list last.
